params.effect: burn that ally after action resolution
params.condition: any damage from this strike is successfully inflicted on an opposing ally

effects.text: If any damage from this strike is successfully inflicted on an opposing ally, burn that ally after action resolution.

params.effect: the opposing vampire goes to torpor during their next unlock phase
params.condition: any damage from this strike is successfully inflicted on an opposing vampire

effects.text: if any damage from this strike is successfully inflicted on an opposing vampire, the opposing vampire goes to torpor during their next unlock phase.
